allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/git/lessnerplumbing/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)  Length: $\($r.RawContentLength\)  Has 'PHP Error': $\($r.Content -match 'A PHP Error was encountered'\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/git/lessnerplumbing/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)  Length: $\($r.RawContentLength\)  Has 'PHP Error': $\($r.Content -match 'A PHP Error was encountered'\)  Has 'Deprecated': $\($r.Content -match 'Deprecated'\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
